case_title: ALLSTATE INSURANCE COMPANY VS. MISSION BAY TOW et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-18-2004 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT. THE DEC-19-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
